title: Model, Surface, Capability, and Constraint Selection · Failure Case: Provider Portability
summary: Choose between Claude and Codex surfaces for a repository and document task. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt provider portability increment in a capability and surface decision matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate stable task contracts from provider-specific syntax and capability assumptions.
Allocate context to governing instructions, task evidence, examples, and tool results according to value.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

theory case — Use a changed theory case for prompt model surface that tests this competency: defend the module contract. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

steps.title: Build Provider Portability evidence
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-provider-portability-nab02j" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Provider Portability into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-provider-portability-nab02j
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Provider Portability structural check is only one gate. a capability and surface decision matrix must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.
